title: erodium cicutarium f. marcuccii
intro: Erodium cicutarium f. marcuccii, also known as the red-stemmed or common geranium, is a subspecies of the annual herbaceous plant Erodium cicutarium. This plant is recognized for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other compounds. The health benefits of Erodium cicutarium f. marcuccii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic to treat wounds and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used as an infusion or decoction, often in combination with other herbs, to create remedies for various health conditions.
